visible_context.local_context_prompt: Ghostlight local context for Sella: Maer has accepted material limits, the ledger is live, the craft waits for decon route Three, packet sound is preservation-only, and Sella may mark timing for bounded diagnostic contact without resolving personhood, custody, provenance, or rescue outcome.

observed_event.observable_action: Maer extends the live Navigator ledger, opens a preservation-only diagnostic acoustic channel, and routes the rescue craft to hold at decon route Three for Sella's timing mark.
observed_event.spoken_text: Accepted. Bounded diagnostic contact only. No full intake, no custody, no personhood finding, no cargo designation. Packet sound remains preservation-only until diagnostic handling is complete. Decon route Three. Isolation absolute. My ledger stays live for staff time, heat burden, and failed extraction cost. Permission is not capacity; the ledger will not pretend otherwise. Open the channel on your timing mark, Sella. We will listen before the window closes.
visibility_notes: Sella can see the live ledger, preservation channel, rescue craft hold marker, and heat timer.
The artifact remains unresolved diagnostic evidence.

source_excerpts.text: Cold Wake made thermal stealth a corridor-law crisis through delayed heat dumps, ghost tracks, near-misses, and misclassified quiet-running vessels.
The Ganymede Route Compact established rescue obligations, shared hazard ledgers, route-steward representation, navigator arbitration status, and later sanctuary/rescue institutional ancestry.
Navigator habitats are built around pressure-managed channels, acoustic commons, orientation pools, dryside galleries, and mixed-interface work surfaces instead of human-only rooms.

Rescue ledgers record who answered distress calls, held formation, and kept sanctuary promises when doing so was more expensive; those records shape credit, escort priority, arbitration, and kinship ties.
Aya doctrine treats care as material infrastructure: water, repair, disability access, sanctuary logistics, clinics, rights-oriented research, and scarce capacity argued over in practice.
Heat debt means quiet-running systems store, reroute, or defer waste heat and borrow against a future dump window.
The Pan-Solar Consortium translates conflict into administrable categories, including thermal behavior classes.

output_contract.response_schema: Return one JSON object. Do not wrap it in Markdown. The object describes this responder's next visible action and optional speech, plus private interpretation clearly labeled as interpretation.
response_rules: Use exactly one allowed action label.
The visible action must be observable by other characters in the scene.
Spoken text may be empty if silence or action is the response.
Private interpretation may describe what Maer suspects or feels, but not what Sella truly intended.
State and relationship updates are candidates only; the coordinator or mutator decides what becomes canonical.
Do not prove or disprove artifact personhood.
Do not claim custody, ancestry, personhood, full intake, or final rescue success/failure.
Do not copy instruction text into in-world speech.
Do not mention research trace or source refs in the in-world response.

known_absences: The packet does not include proof of personhood.
The packet does not include final rescue outcome.
The packet does not include Sella private state.

packet_prompt_text:
# Ghostlight Sandboxed Responder Packet

You are acting only as the named responder. Use only this packet.

## Local Operating Context
Ghostlight local context for Sella: Maer has accepted material limits, the ledger is live, the craft waits for decon route Three, packet sound is preservation-only, and Sella may mark timing for bounded diagnostic contact without resolving personhood, custody, provenance, or rescue outcome.

## Observed Event
- Event id: event.maer.accepts_conditions_and_opens_channel
- Actor: maer_tidecall
- Observable action: Maer extends the live Navigator ledger, opens a preservation-only diagnostic acoustic channel, and routes the rescue craft to hold at decon route Three for Sella's timing mark.
- Spoken text: Accepted. Bounded diagnostic contact only. No full intake, no custody, no personhood finding, no cargo designation. Packet sound remains preservation-only until diagnostic handling is complete. Decon route Three. Isolation absolute. My ledger stays live for staff time, heat burden, and failed extraction cost. Permission is not capacity; the ledger will not pretend otherwise. Open the channel on your timing mark, Sella. We will listen before the window closes.
- Visibility note: Sella can see the live ledger, preservation channel, rescue craft hold marker, and heat timer.
- Visibility note: The artifact remains unresolved diagnostic evidence.

## Allowed Action Labels
speak, silence, gesture, movement, inspect_object, show_object, withhold_object, transfer_object, set_condition, refuse, wait, withdraw, attack

## Source Excerpts
- lore.cold_wake_category_failure: Cold Wake made thermal stealth a corridor-law crisis through delayed heat dumps, ghost tracks, near-misses, and misclassified quiet-running vessels.
- lore.ganymede_rescue_ledgers: The Ganymede Route Compact established rescue obligations, shared hazard ledgers, route-steward representation, navigator arbitration status, and later sanctuary/rescue institutional ancestry.
- lore.navigator_habitat_interfaces: Navigator habitats are built around pressure-managed channels, acoustic commons, orientation pools, dryside galleries, and mixed-interface work surfaces instead of human-only rooms.
- lore.navigator_rescue_ledgers: Rescue ledgers record who answered distress calls, held formation, and kept sanctuary promises when doing so was more expensive; those records shape credit, escort priority, arbitration, and kinship ties.
- lore.aya_care_infrastructure: Aya doctrine treats care as material infrastructure: water, repair, disability access, sanctuary logistics, clinics, rights-oriented research, and scarce capacity argued over in practice.
- lore.thermal_heat_debt: Heat debt means quiet-running systems store, reroute, or defer waste heat and borrow against a future dump window.
- lore.psc_category_translation: The Pan-Solar Consortium translates conflict into administrable categories, including thermal behavior classes.

## Output Contract
Return one JSON object. Do not wrap it in Markdown. The object describes this responder's next visible action and optional speech, plus private interpretation clearly labeled as interpretation.

Required fields: responder_agent_id, action_label, visible_action, spoken_text, private_interpretation, intended_effect, state_update_candidates, relationship_update_candidates, unresolved_hooks

Rules:
- Use exactly one allowed action label.
- The visible action must be observable by other characters in the scene.
- Spoken text may be empty if silence or action is the response.
- Private interpretation may describe what Maer suspects or feels, but not what Sella truly intended.
- State and relationship updates are candidates only; the coordinator or mutator decides what becomes canonical.
- Do not prove or disprove artifact personhood.
- Do not claim custody, ancestry, personhood, full intake, or final rescue success/failure.
- Do not copy instruction text into in-world speech.
- Do not mention research trace or source refs in the in-world response.

review_notes: Trace-backed Sella timing packet for Scene 07. Coordinator-scoped retrieval is embedded as source excerpts; responder received no repo access.
